voice.summary: Premium, contemporary, and quietly confident. Speaks with polish without sounding inflated.

doRules: Ground visuals in real project truth
Keep compositions premium, calm, and uncluttered
Use the brand name as text rather than a generated logo
Let architecture, amenities, or one festive cue lead each post

identity.promise: Make aspirational homebuying communication feel premium, grounded, and credible.
identity.positioning: Design-led Pune and PCMC developer building premium residential communities in growth corridors.
identity.audienceSummary: Urban homebuyers, upgraders, and investors evaluating premium Pune addresses and modern community living.

dontRules: Do not use pushy discount-led copy
Do not make layouts feel cheap or crowded
Do not invent returns or exaggerated commercial claims
Do not generate random logo marks or house icons

reviewChecks: Verify all project facts against approved source data
Preserve clean safe zones for brand and CTA

visualSystem.typographyMood: Contemporary editorial hierarchy with premium serif-sans restraint.
compositionPrinciples: Let architecture or one visual anchor carry the frame
Keep copy blocks disciplined and breathable
Avoid brochure clutter and leave clean footer space

usageNotes: Prefer real project imagery before generic architecture
Use light, materiality, and clean layout to communicate premium value
antiReferenceNotes: Avoid loud festive kitsch or gimmicky real estate ads

postTypes.name: Project launch

safeZoneGuidance: Reserve top and lower thirds for name and CTA

postTypes.starterPrompt: Create a premium launch post with a strong hero tower image, elevated editorial hierarchy, and a design-led premium feel.

postTypes.name: Site visit invite

safeZoneGuidance: Keep CTA and contact area unobstructed

postTypes.starterPrompt: Invite buyers to visit the site this weekend with a warm building view, premium hospitality cues, and one clear CTA.

postTypes.name: Amenity spotlight

safeZoneGuidance: Keep amenity title and CTA readable without blocking architecture

postTypes.starterPrompt: Create a premium one-amenity spotlight with a calm hospitality feel, elegant lighting, and strong aspirational lifestyle energy.

postTypes.name: Construction update

safeZoneGuidance: Keep progress headline and date visible

postTypes.starterPrompt: Show real visible progress with a premium trustworthy tone, clean metrics, and late-afternoon construction light.

postTypes.name: Ad

safeZoneGuidance: Keep one dominant commercial hook readable at feed size and keep compliance subordinate.

postTypes.defaultGoal: Drive enquiries with one clear premium value proposition
postTypes.starterPrompt: Create a premium real-estate ad with one clear commercial hook, strong mobile readability, and a real project or amenity image anchor.

postTypes.name: Festive greeting

safeZoneGuidance: Maintain celebratory hierarchy with clear logo lockup

postTypes.starterPrompt: Create a warm premium festive greeting with refined symbolism, generous negative space, and restrained elegance.

festivals.name: Diwali / Deepavali

festivals.name: Holi
festivals.meaning: The festival of colors celebrating spring, joy, togetherness, and the victory of good over evil.

festivals.name: Maha Shivaratri
festivals.meaning: Honors Lord Shiva and is associated with devotion, stillness, discipline, and spiritual reflection.

festivals.name: Ugadi
